rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (Radford et al. date).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (incorrect citations and dates).
